summary: Rewrite central config loader with sync loadCentralConfig (manual field validation) and mergeCentralConfig returning {effective, diff, metadata} format. RL confidence threshold from central.rl.override_min_confidence, locked field protection, hard bound clamping. TDD: 8 tests RED→GREEN.
notes: Validated with bun test packages/opencode-config-loader/test/central-config.test.js (8 pass, 0 fail). Backward-compatible: index.js re-exports preserved for bootstrap.js and model-router-x consumers.
